analyst.description: Reads OperatorSpec and roofline data, then emits bounded bottleneck reports. Never asks Coder for full-kernel rewrites.

coder.description: Produces one small ChangeProposal JSON per round. It may edit code only through bounded before/after snippets.

profiler.description: Runs deterministic closed-loop scripts or MCP tools for compile, correctness, benchmark and A/B data collection.

judge.description: Accepts only deterministic A/B evidence from run_closed_loop. Decides KEEP/REJECT/ERROR with noise margin.

reflector.description: Summarizes failures and KEEP patterns into run-local memory and reusable skills.

logger.description: Passive logger. Tool events go to results/opencode_events.jsonl; A/B logs go to runs/<run_id>/logs/.

closed-loop-dry.description: Fast non-GPU check of the closed-loop pipeline and artifact layout
closed-loop-dry.template: Call MCP run_closed_loop with dry_run=true, phase='explore', rounds=1, kernel_path='kernel/splitk_h128.cu'. Then report run_dir, logs, rounds/round_001/proposal.json and decision.json.

closed-loop-real.description: Run real compile/correctness/benchmark/A-B on the target GPU
closed-loop-real.template: Call MCP run_closed_loop with dry_run=false, rounds=1, kernel_path='kernel/splitk_h128.cu', batch=1, seq_kv=4096, headdim=128. Summarize KEEP/REJECT/ERROR and point to runs/<run_id>/logs/summary.md.

proposal.template: As Coder, read AGENTS.md, MCP get_operator_spec and query_memory. First decide phase: explore/macro, stabilize/meso, or tune/micro. Output exactly one ChangeProposal JSON object including proposal_id, target, change_type, scale, phase, one_line_summary, before, after or patched_source, hypothesis, risk, validation_scope, rollback_plan. Macro candidates are allowed early but must be isolated.

tune-proposal.description: Generate one late-stage micro ChangeProposal JSON
tune-proposal.template: As Coder, generate exactly one phase='tune', scale='micro' ChangeProposal. before must uniquely match current source, after is a small replacement snippet, changed lines <= 6. Do not output full .cu.

latest-run.template: Call MCP latest_run and list_runs. Report manifest, events, logs, rounds and versions paths.

spec.description: Show current operator specification and optimization space
spec.template: Call MCP list_operators and get_operator_spec for flashattention_kvcache_decode. Highlight test matrix, backend constraints and allowed strategy names.

agent-smoke.description: Run non-GPU generalized multi-agent smoke test
agent-smoke.template: Call MCP run_agent_smoke and explain whether the generic OperatorSpec loop still works.
